name: Recomposition · Phase 1 · Week 1 (Volume)
author: Coach (Claude)
notes: Opening week of an 8-week body-recomp block. Posterior-chain biased (counters your quad-dominant history from Mar–Apr). Unilateral + rear-delt work targets the left-trap asymmetry from boxing jab-side protraction. RPE 7 most sets, last set RPE 8 (1 RIR). Rest 90–120s compounds, 60–90s accessories.

1.name: Upper Push
1.note: Face pulls come first to pre-activate rear delts — fights the jab-side protraction pattern before heavy pressing.

2.name: Lower Hinge (posterior chain)
2.note: Priority day for hamstrings + glutes. Start with hinge before any quad work.

3.name: Boxing
3.note: Coach session. Track: duration + calories. If skipped, try to slot spinning Thursday evening.

4.name: Upper Pull
4.note: Rear-delt volume day. Keep trap work symmetric — alternate leading hand on shrugs.

exercises.note: If < 5 reps per set, use assisted
Asymmetry priority — match reps per side

5.name: Lower Squat (quads)
5.note: Your strength — but keep it quality. 10-min bike warmup first to settle any quad tingling.

exercises.note: Second dose of hamstring volume this week

6.name: Carries + Core
6.note: Short, high-quality. Good partner for a light spinning session same day.

exercises.note: Goal: 60 kg/hand unbroken (= 132 lb). Start heavier than last block.

7.name: Rest / hip flexor protocol
7.note: Mandatory mobility today: 90/90, kneeling stretch, couch stretch, propped butterfly. 10 min total. Walk 30 min.
